title: Ulcerative colitis remedies: 8 herbal teas for individuals
description: Taraxacum officinale teas, also known as dandelion root tea, may help alleviate symptoms of ulcerative colitis due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The tea contains flavonoids, phenolic acids, and sesquiterpenes, which have been shown to reduce inflammation and oxidative stress in the gut. These compounds may also help protect the gut lining and promote the growth of beneficial gut bacteria.  If you're considering trying Taraxacum officinale teas for ulcerative coli...
